name: Chunky Vegetarian Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pinto beans, rinsed and drained
2 cans Kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté green pepper, onion, and garlic in oil until tender.
2. Stir in all remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 25-30 minutes or until rice is cooked, stirring occasionally.
4. If a thinner chili is desired, add additional water.
Serves 10.
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (1 cup) equals 2 starch, 2 vegetables; also, 191 Calories, 616 mg Sodium, 0 Cholesterol, 38 grams carbohydrate, 7 grams protein, and 2 grams fat.
